name: Atreyu
description:
'''Atreyu''' is an American [[rock music|rock]] band from [[Yorba Linda, California]], formed in 1998. The band's current line-up consists of guitarists Dan Jacobs and Travis Miguel, lead vocalist [[Brandon Saller]], bassist and [[Unclean vocals|unclean vocalist]] Marc "Porter" McKnight and drummer Kyle Rosa.

The band has released ten studio albums: ''[[Suicide Notes and Butterfly Kisses]]'' (2002), ''[[The Curse (Atreyu album)|The Curse]]'' (2004), ''[[A Death-Grip on Yesterday]]'' (2006), ''[[Lead Sails Paper Anchor]]'' (2007), ''[[Congregation of the Damned]]'' (2009), ''[[Long Live (Atreyu album)|Long Live]]'' (2015), ''[[In Our Wake]]'' (2018), ''[[Baptize (album)|Baptize]]'' (2021), ''[[The Beautiful Dark of Life]]'' (2023) and ''[[The End Is Not the End (Atreyu album)|The End Is Not the End]]'' (2026).
